- Extended Testing

Testing done by the extended testing team (consultants).

Supersedes all categories below!

- Automated Tests

Bug was detected as a consequence of automated tests.

Supersedes all categories below!

- Monthly Tests

Monthly Regression and update testing done by Team QA.

- Werks Tests

Verifying werks (e.g. as part of release testing).

- Initiative Testing

Test during initiative development or planned testing.

- Alpha Testing

Focused QA testing for regressions or new features.

- Beta Testing

Confirmed bug, found during beta phase.

- Patch Release Testing

Testing done on a release candidate build/branch for a patch release.

- None

None of the above apply (e.g. drive-by discovery).
